# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_interface (Data Source)

Configure OSPFv3 interfaces.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `area` (String) The OSPFv3 area this interface belongs to.
- `bfd` (Boolean) Enable BFD support for this interface.
- `carp_depend_on` (String) CARP VHID to depend on.
- `cost` (Number) Interface cost.
- `cost_demoted` (Number) Interface cost when demoted.
- `dead_interval` (Number) Dead interval in seconds.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this OSPFv3 interface.
- `hello_interval` (Number) Hello interval in seconds.
- `interface_name` (String) The interface name.
- `network_type` (String) Network type.
- `passive` (Boolean) Enable passive mode for this interface.
- `priority` (Number) Interface priority.
- `retransmit_interval` (Number) Retransmit interval in seconds.
- `transmit_delay` (Number) Transmit delay in seconds.
